system.description: A larger incarnation of the plasma grenade, a salvo of plasma missiles can easily turn enemy troops into a smoking crater. Indeed, a Battle-Brother must take care when firing one of these dangerous weapons that his own Kill-team is sufficiently out of harm’s way. Plasma missiles have the same continuing effect as a plasma grenade. In addition, they pose an additional threat to vehicles. The plasma core can become fused with the hull, leaving no escape. If a plasma missile attack on a vehicle scores 4 or more degrees of success, the Blast radius becomes centred on the vehicle rather than a stationary point.
